name: libpackage-stash-xs-perl
title: libpackage-stash-xs-perl
summary: Perl module providing routines for manipulating stashes (XS version)
description:
Perl module providing routines for manipulating stashes (XS version)
Manipulating stashes (Perl's symbol tables) is occasionally necessary, but
incredibly messy, and easy to get wrong. Package::Stash hides all of that
behind a simple API.
.
Package::Stash::XS provides the faster and more correct XS implementation.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libpackage-stash-xs-perl because Perl module providing routines for manipulating stashes (XS version).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libpackage-stash-xs-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libpackage-stash-xs-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libpackage-stash-xs-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
